introSection: DC Rivals HyperCoaster is a steel hyper roller coaster at Warner Bros. Movie World in Gold Coast, Queensland, Australia. It opened in 2017 and was manufactured by Mack Rides.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The highest point of the ride was topped off on 4 August 2017. On 19 August 2017, the ride began testing. In mid-September 2017, the ride soft opened in preparation for its official opening on September 22.

sections.title: Design
sections.content:
DC Rivals HyperCoaster is a hypercoaster from Mack Rides, similar to Flash at Lewa Adventure. The final carriage is turned backwards. It is the tallest, fastest, and longest full circuit roller coaster in Australia. It contains a tall non inverting loop, a first for a Mack Rides GmbH & Co KG coaster.

The ride has pink track and dark grey supports.

To the right of the lift hill is a sign depicting Cyborg fighting Deathstroke; during the final portion of the ride is another sign depicting Aquaman fighting Black Manta.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: 2 trains with 6 cars per train. In each car, riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows, except for the last car, which has a single row facing backwards while all other cars have two rows facing forwards. So the capacity per train is 22. It is themed to the Batmobile and its restraints consist of the Mack lap bars and the restraints open automatically at the end of the ride.

fullText:
DC Rivals HyperCoaster is a steel hyper roller coaster at Warner Bros. Movie World in Gold Coast, Queensland, Australia. It opened in 2017 and was manufactured by Mack Rides.

The highest point of the ride was topped off on 4 August 2017. On 19 August 2017, the ride began testing. In mid-September 2017, the ride soft opened in preparation for its official opening on September 22.

DC Rivals HyperCoaster is a hypercoaster from Mack Rides, similar to Flash at Lewa Adventure. The final carriage is turned backwards. It is the tallest, fastest, and longest full circuit roller coaster in Australia. It contains a tall non inverting loop, a first for a Mack Rides GmbH & Co KG coaster.

The ride has pink track and dark grey supports.

To the right of the lift hill is a sign depicting Cyborg fighting Deathstroke; during the final portion of the ride is another sign depicting Aquaman fighting Black Manta.

2 trains with 6 cars per train. In each car, riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows, except for the last car, which has a single row facing backwards while all other cars have two rows facing forwards. So the capacity per train is 22. It is themed to the Batmobile and its restraints consist of the Mack lap bars and the restraints open automatically at the end of the ride.
